d929b7900562dbd4.ai_summary_short: The analysis has been written to stdout. Summary:¥n¥n**This is not a commatrix code failure.** The `network-flow-matrix-tests` step passed; the job failed in `single-node-e2e-test` because the openshift-tests `staticpod-install-monitor` detected that `kube-apiserver` static pod revision 4 did not appear within 3m15s on the single control-plane node.¥n¥nThe likely trigger is stacked disruption on SNO: the commatrix nftables test intentionally rebooted the only node (‾19:49) while monitors were running, and the 4.20¥u21924.21 upgrade followed (‾20:34¥u201321:25) with additional kube-apiserver `StaticPods_Error` events. Commatrix tolerates up to 20 minutes for recovery; the monitor allows only 3m15s.¥n¥n**Issue class:** `test_failure` | **Severity:** `MEDIUM` | **Flake:** likely yes, with caveats¥n¥nNo breaking commatrix PR was identified. Recommended actions: retry the job, reconsider test ordering/cleanup of the nftables MachineConfig before upgrade, or adjust monitor tolerance for SNO upgrade jobs.

The `ofcir-acquire` script POSTed to the OFCIR API (`https://ofcir.apps-int.master.ci.devcluster.openshift.com/v1/ofcir?name=<job>/<build>&type=host_el9`) to acquire a bare-metal `host_el9` CI
33426329c0a51e2d.ai_summary_short: **Root Cause:** The job failed during the `ofcir-acquire` pre-step, before any cluster provisioning or commatrix tests ran. The `ofcir-acquire` script POSTed to the OFCIR API (`https://ofcir.apps-int.master.ci.devcluster.openshift.com/v1/ofcir?name=<job>/<build>&type=host_el9`) to acquire a bare-metal `host_el9` CI resource and received HTTP 404. The 46-byte error body was censored in logs, so the exact OFCIR error message is unavailable, but the failure is clearly at bare-metal host acquisition ¥u2014 not in commatrix logic. The downstream `ofcir-release` 404s are a consequence of no CIR ever being acquired (`/tmp/secret/install-status.txt` missing). The job acquired its `equinix-ocp-metal-quota-slice` lease successfully, so this is not a quota exhaustion issue.¥n¥n**Breaking PR/Commit:** Not identifiable in `openshift-kni/commatrix`. No commatrix code ran ¥u2014 the job never reached `baremetalds-devscripts-setup`, `network-flow-matrix-tests`, or any e2e step. This is an OpenShift CI infrastructure / OFCIR provisioning failure. A contributing factor is a pre-existing retry bug in the OFCIR acquire script: `timeout 70s` combined with `--retry-delay 60` effectively allows only ‾1 attempt before failure. This is being addressed in https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/80393 (opened 2026-06-11, after this run). The most recent change to the acquire script was https://github.com/openshift/release/commit/6cf7de8e (PR https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/80081, OSAC cluster profile) ¥u2014 unrelated to `host_el9` acquisition.¥n¥n**Affected Images:**¥n- `dev-scripts` ¥u2014 used by `ofcir-acquire` and `ofcir-release` (where the failure occurred)¥n- `ci-telco-runner-latest` ¥u2014 would run `network-flow-matrix-tests` (never reached)¥n- Release payloads: `initial` (4.20 stable) and `latest` (4.21 candidate) ¥u2014 imported successfully¥n- Commatrix ¥u2014 built from source at runtime in `network-flow-matrix-tests` (never reached)¥n¥n**Is it a flake?** yes ¥u2014 Recent history shows 5 consecutive successes before
